nasb.text: They who dwell in the ends of the earth stand in awe of Your signs; You make the dawn and the sunset shout for joy.

esv.text: so that those who dwell at the ends of the earth are in awe at your signs. You make the going out of the morning and the evening to shout for joy.

cnv.text: 因此，住在地極的人都因你的神蹟起了敬畏的心； 你使日出和日落之地的人都歡呼歌唱。

ccb.text: 你奇妙的作为使远在地极的人心生敬畏， 你使日出之地和日落之处都传来欢呼声。

csbs.text: 住在地极的人因你的神迹而心存敬畏， 你使日出日落之地都欢呼。
